nasb.text: He went on his journeys from the Negev as far as Bethel, to the place where his tent had been at the beginning, between Bethel and Ai,

esv.text: And he journeyed on from the Negeb as far as Bethel to the place where his tent had been at the beginning, between Bethel and Ai,

cnv.text: 他從南地一站一站往前走，到伯特利去；到伯特利和艾城中間，就是他起先支搭帳棚的地方，

csbs.text: 他从南地起程继续往伯特利去，到了伯特利和艾之间，就是他先前支搭帐篷的地方，
